steps.title: Identify the grammatical structures
steps.content: The left side is an independent clause: subject (“goals”) + verb (“were”) + description (“threefold”). The right side is a series of three parallel infinitive phrases (to ensure..., to secure..., and to advocate...).

steps.title: Apply the colon rule
steps.content: A colon introduces a list or elaboration that follows an independent clause. The other choices violate this rule—either creating a sentence fragment (B), omitting necessary punctuation (C), or misusing semicolon syntax (D). That matches choice A — A is correct.
